creator: kamalamalamalam@gmail.com
text: I'm running FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE in VirtualBox with virtualbox-ose-additions-6.1.18_1 and virtualbox-ose-kmod6.1.18_1 and whenever I start Plasma, ether through sddm or xinit, it stays stuck on the loading screen. When I disable vboxguest and vboxservice then Plasma is able to start.
